sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9557" key="a)nteisodia/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντεισ-οδιάζω</orth>, <sense id="n9557.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bring in, introduce in turn,</tr_> Sch.D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0559.tlg001:p.72H" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.72H.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
